india_trends.title: Indian equities deserve higher FII allocation, but valuations stretched
india_trends.summary: India merits a higher allocation given its structural strengths. While the underlying business is strong, the valuations are not attractive, said Ramneek Kundra, chief investment officer at DSP Pension Fund Managers. But India’s premium to emerging markets has come down.
